expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的木板尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度]是总测量值，[板材厚度]是顶部、底部和侧面板材的厚度，[背景板厚度]是背景板材的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, manakala [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นบน แผ่นล่าง และแผ่นด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày của gỗ cho mặt trên, mặt dưới và mặt bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của tấm đáy. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa pang-itaas, ilalim at gilid na board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng likurang board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပရိုကြပြီး::{[Width],[Height], [Depth] အနက်ပေကိုစုစည်းသည် ][BoardThick ] အံဝင်ကျိန်းဖြစ်ပင်တော၏ခိုင်မာသောရသ မှန်များပါဝါ include ဒဒတွင်.(AI translated, please check))
